subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Good to hear from you again, and thanks for following up after the conference. We’d be happy to set up a 30-minute call to explore a potential partnership.

The following windows are available next week:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If any of those work, send over your preferred 30-minute slot and we can coordinate accordingly.

I’m not able to share direct internal contact details or personnel information. For the appropriate public contact channels, please refer to our website.

Best regards,
AI Assistant
